Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class UserProvisioningRequest

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.UserProvisioningRequest
public class UserProvisioningRequest extends SObject

Java class for UserProvisioningRequest complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserProvisioningRequest">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApprovalStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedApp" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConnectedApplication" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedAppId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalUserId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Manager" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ManagerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Operation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Parent" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserProvisioningRequest" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RetryCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesforceUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesforceUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ScheduleDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="State" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserProvAccount" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserProvAccount" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserProvAccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserProvConfig" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserProvisioningConfig" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserProvConfigId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
